meaning: n.(蒸汽加压煮出的)浓咖啡
examples: I just come back with my black coffee and my double espresso mocha latte skinny frothed, except it isn't espresso.
Customers go for a café cortado or an espresso in Continental bars.
My reward is an espresso maker.
It too serves nothing but hand-brewed coffee and espresso in utterly stripped back and minimalist surroundings.
Old men lean on the outside windowsill, ordering cortados (espresso with milk) and empanadas to go.
